commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=5f9ae36ab7d869e1f9f06c35417a974165745b5f)
commands.review_summary:
The PR expands `skills/autoreview/SKILL.md` with keyed model/thinking examples and a per-engine model/thinking matrix for Codex, Claude, Droid, and Copilot.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding: source inspection shows current `main` rejects Droid `--thinking`, while the PR documents Droid `--thinking low` examples. No separate runtime execution was needed to establish that mismatch.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs contributor or maintainer handling because the branch depends on an open Droid support PR and lacks real behavior proof, which automation cannot provide for the contributor.

target.title: docs(autoreview): document model and thinking per engine
target.body:
## Summary
- add a **Models and thinking** section to `skills/autoreview/SKILL.md`
- document `--model` / `--thinking` forwarding for Codex, Claude, Droid, and Copilot
- show keyed-form examples for complex model IDs (slashes, colons)

## Why
Model selection is already wired in the helper (`--model engine=id`, panel syntax, per-engine CLI flags) but was only partially documented. This makes explicit invocation discoverable for all current main engines.

## Validation
- `ruby scripts/validate-skills`

## Notes
- Pi model docs land separately in PR #15 once that engine merges.
- Droid reasoning-effort runtime support is in PR #16.

Made with [Cursor](https://cursor.com)
target.author: coygeek
